character.name: Elementalist
character.prompt: female mage character, woman with feminine face and build, flowing open hair falling freely around face and shoulders, hood of robe hanging loosely down behind back NOT on head, sharp intelligent eyes clearly visible, dark flowing robes with deep purple and midnight blue tones, holding a tall ornate staff with split amber-frost crystal at top as ONLY held object, hands empty except for staff, no flames no orbs in hands, upright composed casting stance, rift energy blue-purple glow on staff crystal and robe hem, dark fantasy roguelite, RIMA universe
